chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. M.A. No.487 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. FOR ORDER ON OFFICE OBJECTION A/W REPLY AT ‘A’ 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE --------- 09.7.2025 Applicant in-person Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. P.G. Mr. Muhammad Younus Owais, Advocate undertakes to file Power. ------- After hearing the matter at-length, applicant appeared in person does not press his application provided an observation may be recorded that the Investigating Officer shall not be influenced by any finding or observation recorded in the bail order dated 15.4.2025 passed in Criminal Bail Application No.700 of 2025. It is settled law that the findings or observations recorded in bail order are tentative in nature, even otherwise para 22 of the bail order has itself incorporated that the finding or observation given in such bail order are tentative in nature only for the purposes of deciding the bail application. Therefore, the I.O. will submit proper challan in the light of above observation and the concerned Magistrate shall pass an appropriate order. Application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE asim/PA
